regional_cost_note: Builders in Napier typically charge $80–$100/hr for labour. New builds run $2,800–$4,200/m² depending on specifications. Heritage renovations on the city's Art Deco villas often command a premium due to specialist joinery and plasterwork. Always verify your builder's LBP licence at lbp.govt.nz before signing a contract.

businesses.name: Total Renovations Hawke's Bay
businesses.known_for: Transforming older villas and bungalows into modern homes; full project management from building consent through to completion.

businesses.name: Lamont Homes
businesses.known_for: Ground-up residential construction; specialises in sheds, decking, pergolas, and general builds from concrete to roofline.

businesses.name: Toa Civil Construction
businesses.known_for: General and civil construction covering residential builds, earthworks, concrete, foundations, and demolition across Napier and Hawke's Bay.

businesses.name: BB Build
businesses.known_for: Passive House accredited builder focused on sustainable design, new builds, and high-performance renovations.

businesses.name: Dougan Homes
businesses.known_for: Locally owned since 2018; Master Builders member specialising in custom new homes, renovations, and eco-friendly builds with a personalised approach.
